title_en: 7. Abu Hurairah (radhiAllaahu 'anhu) reports that Rasoolullah (sallallaahu 'alaihi wa
title_ar: الحديث السابع: رواية أبي هريرة رضي الله عنه
content_en: sallam) came to the graveyard and said Peace be upon you, dwelling of Believing People and we will (all) if Allaah wills join you soon. I would have liked to have seen our brothers! They said: Are we not your brothers, O Messenger of Allaah? He said You are my Companions and our brothers are those who have not yet come! They said: How will you know those who have not yet come from your Ummah, O Messenger of Allaah? He said Have you not seen that if a man had a horse with a white blaze and hoof along with a totally jet-black horse, then would he not know his horse? They said: Certainly, O Messnger of Allaah. He said So they will come with white blazes and marks from the wudoo and I am present before them at the Hand ('water-tank') Indeed men will be driven away from my 'water-tank' as the lost camel is driven away from their gathering place. 'Come on'. So it will be said: 'Indeed they have made changes after you,' so I will say: Be off, be off. [Muslim 249].
title_id: Hadis 7: Abu Hurairah tentang Umat Nabi yang Dikenali dari Cahaya Wudu
content_id: Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu anhu) meriwayatkan bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ mendatangi kuburan dan bersabda: Salam atas kalian, wahai kampung kaum mukminin. Insya Allah kami pun akan menyusul kalian. Aku ingin seandainya aku telah melihat saudara-saudara kita! Mereka bertanya: Bukankah kami saudara-saudara engkau, wahai Rasulullah? Beliau bersabda: Kalian adalah para sahabatku, sedangkan saudara-saudara kami adalah mereka yang belum datang. Mereka bertanya: Bagaimana engkau akan mengenali orang-orang dari umatmu yang belum datang, wahai Rasulullah? Beliau bersabda: Tidakkah kamu lihat jika seseorang memiliki kuda berbintik putih di dahi dan kakinya di antara kuda-kuda yang hitam legam, tidakkah ia mengenal kudanya? Mereka menjawab: Tentu, wahai Rasulullah. Beliau bersabda: Mereka datang dengan wajah, tangan, dan kaki yang bercahaya karena bekas wudu, dan aku mendahului mereka di telaga. Sesungguhnya akan ada orang-orang yang dihalau dari telagaku sebagaimana unta yang tersesat dihalau dari kumpulannya. Akan dikatakan: Ayo. Maka akan dikatakan: Sesungguhnya mereka telah mengadakan perubahan setelahmu. Maka aku berkata: Pergilah, pergilah. [Muslim (249)].
content_ar: sallam) came to the graveyard and said Peace be upon you, dwelling of Believing People and we will (all) إذا Allaah wills join you soon. I would have liked to have seen our brothers! قالوا: Are we not your brothers, O Messenger of Allaah? قال You are my الصحابة and our brothers are those who have not yet come! قالوا: How will you know those who have not yet come from your الأمة, O Messenger of Allaah? قال Have you not seen that إذا a man had a horse with a white blaze and hoof along with a totally jet-black horse, then would he not know his horse? قالوا: Certainly, O Messnger of Allaah. قال لذا they will come with white blazes and marks from the الوضوء and I am present قبل them at the Hand ('water-tank') Indeed men will be driven away from my 'water-tank' as the lost camel is driven away from their gathering place. 'Come on'. لذا it will be said: 'Indeed they have made changes بعد you,' لذا I will say: Be off, be off. [مسلم 249].
